items.title: After shocking quarter, IBM insists that AI isn’t killing the mainframe
items.summary: After IBM's stock crashed last week on warnings of a poor mainframe sales, the CEO explained that AI wrecked corporate hardware budget, temporarily.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
items.summary: The company said earlier this year it expected to spend as much as $190bn on AI investments.
